comment: 14yo with characteristic perioral and buccal mucosal pigmentation (mucocutaneous melanin spots) + history of small-bowel intussusception age 10 requiring resection (showed hamartomatous polyps on histology). Father similarly affected with Peutz-Jeghers phenotype. Engine routes to PreventionPlan (after Agent F): standard = pre-test counseling + germline STK11 panel + small-bowel surveillance (VCE or MR enterography q2-3y from age 8-10) + colonoscopy q2-3y from age 18 + breast MRI from 30 (women); alternative = empirical surveillance.
